data.headline: Welcome to Al-Razi, a space to grow, heal, and connect
data.description: A new holistic wellness space in Amman, offering a space to heal, connect and grow. Home to therapists, specialists, healing practices and more.

data.body: At Al-Razi, wellness is not rushed, intimidating, or out of reach. We create a calm, grounded place where healing feels natural.
data.heading: MENTAL WELLBEING MATTERS

data.card1_bodyLines:
Join any one of the many support group sessions
listen, share and grow with others
data.card2_bodyLines:
At Al Razi there is a wide variety of specialists to choose from
create a well-rounded program to help you heal
data.card3_bodyLines: Choose from a wide range of movement classes to enhance your mental wellbeing journey

data.body: At Al Razi there is a wide range of sessions all catered to your specific needs. Tailored programs mean a fully rounded experience.
data.title: Sessions Include
data.item1_body: Choose from a wide range of specialists to suit your need
data.item2_body: Sit with specialised nutritionists to help improve your physical health
data.item3_body: Choose from the right movement, meditation or breathing program to help rebuild inner peace

data.title: What Our Community Says
data.quote_1: Al-Razi gave me a safe, calm space to finally start working on my mental health. The specialists are warm, professional, and genuinely invested in your progress.
data.quote_2: The group sessions here changed everything for me. I came in feeling isolated and left feeling part of a community that truly understands.
data.quote_3: From the nutrition coaching to the movement classes, everything at Al-Razi feels connected and thoughtful. It is the most holistic approach to wellbeing I have ever experienced.
data.subtitle: Guests return to Al-Razi for the calm, the care, and the connection.

data.address:
5 Saeed Abu Jaber Street
Um Uthaina
Amman
Jordan
data.heading: Visit Al-Razi

data.body: Stay updated on memberships, events, offers, and new experiences.
data.heading: Join the Community

contact.address: 5 Saeed Abu Jaber Street, Um Uthaina, Amman, Jordan
